title: Cobblemon - Union Room
description: Cobblemon modpack focused on exploration and social interaction.
body:
# Union Room - A Cobblemon Modpack
_A personal project of mine that massively exploded in scope._


A Cobblemon modpack based on my vision of the best multiplayer Cobblemon experience possible.

Focused on exploration, immersion, and social interaction. Includes revamped terrain generation, dozens of structures, many atmospheric and immersive additions, and all battle gimmicks.

## Features
- Mega Evolutions, Z Moves, Dynamax and Gigantamax, Terastalization
- Revamped terrain generation with Terralith, Biomes O' Plenty, and Oh the Biomes We've Gone
- Seasons, new water animations, and new environment-dependent atmospheric sounds
- Create Mod integration to automate anything
- Depressed Gengar
- Rideable Pokemon via Ride On
- Pokemon Fight or Flight and LivelierPokemon integration (this pack removes _most_ vanilla mobs, remove In Control if you want to play with them)
- Legendary Pokemon, their respective structures and items
- Alpha Pokemon
- Sirdoof??
- Music
- Gambling

## System Requirements and Performance
8GB RAM recommended, 4GB RAM minimum **(important)**
Any less and you should expect noticable stuttering.

Mid to high-end systems should enable shaders and Distant Horizons for _**aesthetics**_.

If you adjust your shader settings or install a new one, I recommend you turn realtime shadows up to High. This prevents issues with the bushy leaves.

### Server Performance
Pregenerating chunks with Chunky is highly recommended. Chunky is prepackaged in the modpack and server pack.

The amount of RAM your server requires depends heavily on your system and number of players, so please do your own testing and adjust as required. I personally have had the best results with 6 - 8GB.

## Multiplayer
[Server Pack](https://drive.google.com/file/d/10YsupPkhHXdUM8tp7GOgKy7-fUGeF7rV/view?usp=sharing)

For multiplayer, place these files into your dedicated server.

## Progression
As of 2.0.5, quests has been added to the modpack. Please follow the instructions and download the additional mods when prompted to access them. They are not strictly required to play with the pack, but recommended. If you want to remove them, remove the relevant mods from your server as well to prevent incompatabilities.

You can reach me as sixgarden on Discord

Special thanks to theblindbandit6 for allowing me to use Ukelele Pichu

https://modrinth.com/datapack/cobblemon-ukulele-pichu-addon
